title: Adrenal Fatigue After 40: Signs, Causes, and Natural Recovery

excerpt: Persistent exhaustion, afternoon crashes, and brain fog after 40 may point to HPA axis dysfunction. Learn the real causes of adrenal fatigue after 40 and proven strategies to recover naturally.
